ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Short abbreviation for the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division FOREIGN KEY ("division") REFERENCES divisions ("division_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference FOREIGN KEY ("conference") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the division belongs to */,
  "division_abbreviation" TEXT /* Short abbreviation for the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "conference_abbreviation" TEXT /* Short abbreviation for the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_champion" TEXT /* Team that won the Stanley Cup for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., Regular Season, Playoffs) */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went to overtime */,
  "shootout" INTEGER /* Whether the game went to a shootout */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of fans in attendance */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the game's referee */,
  "linesman1" TEXT /* Name of the first linesman */,
  "linesman2" TEXT /* Name of the second linesman */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the team */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties taken by the team */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal */,
  "faceoffs_won" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs won */,
  "power_play_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored on power plays */,
  "short_handed_goals" INTEGER /* Number of short-handed goals */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "blocked_shots" INTEGER /* Number of blocked shots */,
  "giveaways" INTEGER /* Number of giveaways */,
  "takeaways" INTEGER /* Number of takeaways */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is currently on */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Player's birthdate */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Overall pick number of the player */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Player's Twitter handle (if available) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties taken by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal */,
  "faceoffs_taken" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs taken */,
  "faceoffs_won" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs won */,
  "power_play_points" INTEGER /* Number of points scored on power plays */,
  "short_handed_points" INTEGER /* Number of points scored on short-handed situations */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "blocked_shots" INTEGER /* Number of blocked shots */,
  "giveaways" INTEGER /* Number of giveaways */,
  "takeaways" INTEGER /* Number of takeaways */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_games" (
  "player_game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the game belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the player played in */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in the game */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties taken by the player in the game */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "blocked_shots" INTEGER /* Number of blocked shots */,
  "faceoffs_taken" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs taken */,
  "faceoffs_won" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs won */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_games_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "player_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player position */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the position belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the player played in the position */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the position during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the injury belongs to */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "estimated_return_date" TEXT /* Estimated date the player is expected to return */,
  "actual_return_date" TEXT /* Actual date the player returned */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspensions" (
  "suspension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspension */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the suspension belongs to */,
  "suspension_date" TEXT /* Date the suspension was given */,
  "suspension_length" INTEGER /* Length of the suspension in games */,
  "suspension_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the suspension */,
  "suspension_fine" INTEGER /* Fine amount (if any) associated with the suspension */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the suspension */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suspensions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
